case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. BEATRICE KAREN DOUGHERTY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $421.08 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGHERTY, BEATRICE KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED NOV-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGHERTY, BEATRICE KAREN
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-31-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFFPLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BEATHRICE KAREN DOUGHERTY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOUGHERTY, BEATRICE KAREN $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $380.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
